_comment: Services that can safely be paused during a gaming session.

services.name: SysMain
services.reason: Preloads apps into RAM — wastes memory while gaming.

services.name: WSearch
services.reason: Causes high disk I/O during indexing.

services.name: DiagTrack
services.reason: Sends usage data to Microsoft — uses CPU/network in background.

services.name: XblGameSave
services.reason: Cloud sync of game saves — unnecessary network usage.

services.name: MapsBroker
services.reason: Manages offline maps — no gaming relevance.

services.name: RemoteRegistry
services.reason: Allows remote registry access — security benefit to stopping it.
